audience_policies.source_phrase: This pass admits up to 6 people at a discounted rate of $14.00 for adults or seniors , $11.75 for children 3-14 . This is a physical pass that must be picked up at and returned to the library . Present the pass at the ticket booth for discounted admission. Passes are not accepted

coupon.source_phrase_block: This pass admits up to 6 people at a discounted rate of $14.00 for adults or seniors , $11.75 for children 3-14 . This is a physical pass that must be picked up at and returned to the library . Present the pass at the ticket booth for discounted admission. Passes are not accepted in the month of October.
